name: Low-Fat Alfredo Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine cottage cheese and milk; blend until smooth.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, cook sweet pepper and garlic in hot margarine over low heat until tender.
3. Reduce the heat to low. Add the milk mixture, peas, salt, and pepper.
4. Cook and stir until heated through (do not boil). Toss with cooked and drained pasta.
5. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese and fresh basil.
This recipe makes 4 main-dish servings.
Nutrition facts per serving: 362 calories, 5g total fat (1g saturated fat)
13mg cholesterol, 338 mg sodium, 52g carbohydrates, 1 gram fiber and 26 grams protein. Daily value: 18% vitamin A, 37% vitamin C, 8% calcium, and 18% iron.
{Kay's note: I would also add some crab, or shrimp, or clams to make a seafood Alfredo!}
